email_provider: SendGrid API (SMTP) via Firebase Cloud Functions

architecture.ui_model: Dual-UX Responsive (Desktop Static Sidebar / Mobile Slide-out Drawer)
architecture.admin_portal: Dedicated route (/admin) with horizontal tabbed interface. Features Stacked UI (e.g., Teachers roster above Lesson schedule) with local anchor jump links.

settings_privacy_module.crud_pattern: Modern inline responsive Flexbox cards (`isWriting` state) natively handling string escapes and avoiding static HTML form dependencies.

data_pipelines.media_storage: Client-side Canvas compression -> Base64 string -> Direct Firestore document array injection (Bypassing Firebase Storage buckets/CORS entirely).
data_pipelines.data_import_export: Explicit context-aware CSV mapping. Strictly extracts arrays via fixed indices (e.g., Birthdays separated into explicit Month and Day columns for privacy).
data_pipelines.pdf_generation: Absolute off-screen rendering pipeline (display: block !important, left: -9999px) processed via html2pdf.js, bypassing viewport clipping.

tier_1_public.sync: Dynamically pulled from site_settings/privacy_config (Automated via Leaders database table).

tier_2_org_leader.permissions: Manage org-specific Activities, Lessons, Birthdays, Teachers, Spotlights. Driven by `window.currentUserRole`.

tier_3_master_admin.permissions: Manage all orgs, Global Announcements, System Settings, Bulk CSV Uploads, and Database Wipes.

ag_agent_guardrails.editing_protocol: Native IDE file-editing tools ONLY. Terminal editors (sed, awk, echo) are STRICTLY FORBIDDEN.
ag_agent_guardrails.terminal_autonomy: Pre-authorized for safe, read-only terminal commands ONLY (cat, grep, ls).
ag_agent_guardrails.methodology: Diagnostic-First. Perform read-only audits to locate exact breakpoints (e.g., SyntaxErrors, ReferenceErrors, missing DOM elements) before drafting code fixes.
ag_agent_guardrails.execution_checkpoint: Code First, Deploy Second. Stop and report 'Code Complete' locally. DO NOT use browser subagents unless explicitly prompted. Wait for human 'Approved' command to run `firebase deploy`.
ag_agent_guardrails.scope_lock: No unprompted refactoring. Only alter exact lines necessary for the stated mission.
ag_agent_guardrails.state_management: Autonomous versioning (patch/minor bumps) and mandatory updates to PROJECT_STATE.md upon task completion.

recent_milestones: Resolved Strict Mode ReferenceErrors globally by explicitly declaring window-scoped variables.
Fixed Event Propagation/Default Submission clashes on all CRUD initialization buttons (e.g., e.preventDefault()).
Transitioned all Setting modules (Announcements, Spotlights, Teachers, Leaders) to full inline Flex-Card CRUD parity.
Verified SendGrid SMTP automated feedback pipeline.

strategic_roadmap.current_status: Admin Portal 3-Tab + Settings stabilized. Base64 media & SMTP pipelines verified. Strict RBAC enforced.
strategic_roadmap.next_phase: Scale to multi-tenant platform (nxhub.org) using Firebase Authentication and Custom Claims, and conceptualize native iOS Companion App (Flutter/SwiftUI).
